key.description: Widget key, provided by the network.

pageUrl.description: Used to pass the served page URL.

zone.description: Used to pass optional data to the platform.

dataView.description: 3rd party tracker URL in order to track widget view.

organicClicks.description: 3rd party click tracker URL to track organic clicks.

paidClicks.description: 3rd party click tracker URL to track paid clicks.
